item.description:
## What's Changed

- Newer-version detection now also catches local transcript content staleness, not just cloud metadata changes, so users are prompted when the visible transcript is missing or older than the active cloud transcript.
- Selecting recordings no longer flips the account chip to “Needs attention” on transient network hiccups; request failures stay scoped to cache/detail warnings while auth state remains stable.
- Added safe auth-status diagnostics that log callsite and error type only, without token, email, or payload content.

## Validation

- `swift test` passed: 82/82 tests.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- Local stable-signed `./scripts/build-app.sh` passed.
- `codesign -dvv build/RecappiMini.app` confirmed `Authority=RecappiMini Dev`.
- Manual verification on the latest local build confirmed the account chip no longer flips to “Needs attention” when switching recordings.

## Known Limitations / Follow-up

- Large recordings with many transcript segments can still pause during recording selection; performance profiling and lazy rendering work is tracked separately.
